name: Brazilian Vehicles and Prices

name: CarAPI
description: The developer friendly vehicle API. Make, model, trims and more via a RESTFul API

name: CarsXE
description: CarsXE API provides comprehensive data on vehicles, including VIN decoding & specifications, license plate decoding, images, history and market value. It enables developers to build innovative applications for the automotive industry, such as insurance & roadside assistance tools, ride sharing & grocery delivery apps, inventory management systems, and market analysis platforms.

name: Helipaddy sites

description: Telematics data, remotely access vehicle functions, car configurator, locate service dealers

name: NHTSA
description: NHTSA Product Information Catalog and Vehicle Listing

name: Smartcar
description: Lock and unlock vehicles and get data like odometer reading and location. Works on most new cars
